case_title: KELLY MALIA STANFORD VS. REAL ESTATE DISPOSITION CORPORATION(R.E.D.C) et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANFORD, KELLY MALIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT G.M.A.C. MORTGAGE $4,882.50 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,977.50, PUBLIC RECORDS SHOW PROPERTY SOLD FOR MORE THAN CONTRACT PRICE AND THEREFORE GMAC WAS NOT DAMAGED. JUDGMENT AGAINST GMAC ONLY. REDC WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE TRANSACTION: REDC DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY STANFORD, KELLY MALIA REAL ESTATE DISPOSITION CORPORATION(R.E.D.C) G.M.A.C. MORTGAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-20-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT G.M.A.C. MORTGAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-06-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ALL PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR IN COURT AT THE TIME AND PLACE SHOWN ABOVE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT REAL ESTATE DISPOSITION CORPORATION(R.E.D.C) G.M.A.C. MORTGAGE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY STANFORD, KELLY MALIA AS TO DEFENDANT REAL ESTATE DISPOSITION CORPORATION(R.E.D.C) G.M.A.C. MORTGAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD, KELLY MALIA AS TO DEFENDANT G.M.A.C. MORTGAGE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF STANFORD, KELLY MALIA AS TO DEFENDANT REAL ESTATE DISPOSITION CORPORATION(R.E.D.C)
